ogTitle: Tighes Hill vs Tilba Tilba: Climate Safety

heading: Tighes Hill vs Tilba Tilba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tighes Hill, New South Wales and Tilba Tilba, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tilba Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tighes Hill (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tighes Hill or Tilba Tilba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tighes Hill has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Tilba Tilba scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tighes Hill scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Tilba Tilba scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tighes Hill or Tilba Tilba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tilba Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
